message:
fix: include extra_json in conversation character count

conversation_chars previously only counted msg.content.len(), ignoring
the extra_json field entirely. Add json_value_size_hint() (serializes
serde_json::Value for byte length) and message_payload_size_hint()
(sums content + extra_json size) for accurate payload sizing that
affects search ranking and display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
